text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week takes on Seiun Sky in the Kikuka
Sho, the race where the best Umamusume
prevails.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She holds her dream of becoming the best in
Japan close to her heart as she races toward
victory.
